comment.body:
Alma, I find this note at the end of the post useful cause it gives a sense of what kind of price action to expect:

"All in all: volatility is managed, downside is managed. Market is set to range.
Be careful with theta decay today!"

Could you add a note of this kind for each post? I think it would be useful for whom is not yet fully understanding all the language
